background/

Diploma student in Electronics Engineering with a deep interest in Embedded Systems and IoT. Skilled in electronics circuit design, PCB development, and microcontroller programming. Passionate about practical projects and eager to build a career at the intersection of hardware and intelligent systems.

03 — work

Projects

01
Robotic Arm Controller

4-DOF robotic arm controlled via Arduino with servo motors. Implemented inverse kinematics for precise positional control. Demonstrated at Technical Fest 2023 as Arduino Project Coordinator.

Arduino C++ Servo Motors Kinematics
GitHub
02
Line Following Robot

Autonomous line-following robot using IR sensors and PID control algorithm. Built from scratch including custom PCB layout, motor driver circuit, and embedded firmware.

Arduino IR Sensors PID Control PCB Design
GitHub
03
IoT Environment Monitor

Real-time temperature, humidity, and air quality monitoring system with a web dashboard. Data transmitted over Wi-Fi using MQTT protocol with threshold-based alerts.

ESP32 DHT22 MQTT Python
Portfolio
